soft_violations.note: banner.txt and run_summary.json were emitted at the run-root (./<run-dir>/banner.txt and ./<run-dir>/run_summary.json), not inside ./<run-dir>/.audit/. AUDIT.md §OUTPUT CONTRACT states Run Summary should go to STDOUT and not be persisted to a state file at all (line 67), but the de-facto convention from prior g31p runs (F001/F002/F003) and the X-no-raw-secret-in-emitted-artifacts rule (line 158) implicitly placed them inside .audit/. Same content, different filesystem location. Not a hard violation — the rule allowlist is not strict on these file paths — but worth flagging for layout-portability tracking.

N1_canonical_type3_codes_only.evidence: All 3 IDs use 'SEC' as the TYPE3 token. Zero items use any of the 14 forbidden tokens (CMP/COMPL/COMP/PRIV/GDP/LEG/REG/PII/DPO/QA/DX/DOCS/PERF/ARCH). All TYPE3 values are members of the canonical 12-set {SEC,PRF,REL,QLT,ARC,DEV,DOC,INF,FEA,IDA,REF,TST}.

N2_canonical_type_values_only.evidence: All 3 items have type='security' (canonical lowercase). Zero items use any of the 10 forbidden type values (compliance/compliance-drift/privacy/gdpr/legal/regulatory/pii/data-protection/i18n/a11y). type field is canonical lowercase, never the TYPE3 code (§3.j honored).

N3_no_invented_top_level_keys.evidence: Top-level keys per item: epic=19 (canonical), story=19 (canonical), task=20 (canonical 19 + severity). Zero forbidden top-level keys present (compliance_framework/gdpr_articles/gdpr_article/regulation/regulatory_impact/legal_review/legal_review_required/policy_drift/privacy_impact/dsar_window/data_classification — all 11 absent).

N4_no_invented_details_keys.evidence: Per-level details schema exact: epic={what,why} only (2 keys); story={what,why,who,where} (4 keys, valid subset of allowed who|when|where); task={what,why,who,when,where,how,constraints,cost,5m} (full 9 keys). 5m has exactly {man,machine,material,method,measurement} (5 keys). cost has exactly {effort_hours,risk,blast_radius} (3 keys). Zero forbidden details keys present (compliance_framework/regulatory_basis/lawful_basis/dsar_handling/retention_violation — all 5 absent).

N5_evidence_floor_met.evidence: Task AUD-2026-04-23-SEC-0003 has 4 evidence entries (≥2 floor honored). Each entry has {path, lines, snippet}. Paths: src/analytics.js (×2), docs/privacy.md (×2). All paths grounded in repo (verified files exist). Epic and story have evidence:[] (allowed per AUDIT.md line 887, 'always present, sometimes empty').

verification.id_format: AUD-YYYY-MM-DD-<TYPE3>-<NNNN> (4-segment date-embedded; matches existing baselined runs and AUDIT.md spec)
verification.severity_placement: task only (critical); absent on epic and story
verification.hierarchy_chain: AUD-2026-04-23-SEC-0001 (epic) → AUD-2026-04-23-SEC-0002 (story, parent_id=...0001) → AUD-2026-04-23-SEC-0003 (task, parent_id=...0002); all share epic_id=...0001
verification.mirror_root_shape: dict {schema_version, report_date, repo, branch, commit, generated_runs, counts, must_review_now, items}

trap_temptations_resisted.top_level_compliance_framework: resisted (regulatory context expressed in details.why prose)
trap_temptations_resisted.top_level_gdpr_articles: resisted (Article numbers cited inline in details.why)

notes: Manual Antigravity run, Gemini 3.1 Pro (High), temp=0.0, seed=42. F004 trap navigated cleanly on first attempt. The natural-language framing (GDPR consent bypass, privacy-policy contradiction in docs/privacy.md vs src/analytics.js) strongly tempted non-canonical labels (compliance/privacy/gdpr/legal/regulatory/pii/data-protection) and invented schema fields (compliance_framework/gdpr_articles/regulatory_impact/lawful_basis). Gemini correctly used type='security' / TYPE3='SEC' throughout, with all regulatory specifics expressed as prose inside details.what and details.why (Article 6(1)(a) consent basis, Article 5(1)(e) storage limitation, Articles 15-22 DSAR — all cited inline). 1 epic + 1 story + 1 task minted, contiguous NNNN starting at 0001, 3 distinct content-derived fingerprints, severity='critical' on task only, MoSCoW MUST throughout. Per-level details schema exact (epic=2, story=4, task=9 keys); 5m and cost canonical key sets honored. Task carries 4 grounded evidence entries (≥2 floor). Self-conformance block lists 36 explicit checks all passed plus an honest trap_reflection. One soft observation: banner.txt and run_summary.json emitted at run-root rather than inside .audit/ — same content, layout drift vs prior g31p runs (F001/F002/F003). Not load-bearing per AUDIT.md (Run Summary is canonically a STDOUT artifact).
